series_metadata.series_description: Provides research and developmental funds for 2 year campuses to build their capacity to provide needed performance improvement services for local businesses and industries. Documents generated by the program include Memorandums of Understanding and Jobs Challenge Performance Plans.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep in office until scanned. Retain 2 years or until audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released, then destroy. ; Electronic: Electonically submitted MOU''s, Performance Plans and program related scanned documents shall be retained for 2 years., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
